title: post api agent valid EVM token returns structured verdict
description: Test POST /api/agent with a valid EVM coin_symbol (DOGE), a well-formed EVM contract_address, and chain_id=1. Verify response status 200 and JSON body includes all required fields: request_id (string), coin_symbol (matches request), drama_index (number 0-100), dominant_branch (non-empty string), branch_probabilities (object), evidence_chain (array), executable_verdict (one of LIQUIDATE_LONGS|HOLD|ACCUMULATE|IGNORE_FUD), served_from_cache (boolean false). Confirm fallback is absent or false.

title: post api agent missing coin_symbol returns 400
description: Test POST /api/agent with an empty payload {}. Verify response status is 400 and the JSON body contains an 'error' field describing the missing coin_symbol parameter.

title: post api agent native token without contract address returns 200
description: Test POST /api/agent with coin_symbol=BTC and no contract_address field. Verify response status is 200. Since BTC is a native token, DEX and security data should be skipped (fallback defaults). Verify the response JSON still includes all required schema fields: request_id, coin_symbol, drama_index, dominant_branch, branch_probabilities, evidence_chain, executable_verdict, served_from_cache.

title: post api agent Solana token with native contract address returns 200
description: Test POST /api/agent with coin_symbol=SOL and contract_address=native. Verify response status is 200 and the pipeline gracefully handles the native token path. All required fields must be present in the response JSON.

title: post api agent unknown fake coin returns 200 with fallback indicators
description: Test POST /api/agent with coin_symbol=FAKECOIN999 and a random fake contract_address. Verify response status is 200 (not 500). The pipeline should degrade gracefully with fallback=true or still return a valid MCTS verdict. All schema fields must be present. executable_verdict must be one of the four valid values.
